signals.headline: Bitcoin Surges Above $70K with $400M-$500M Short Liquidations | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Bitcoin Surges Above $70K with $400M-$500M Short Liquidations | YES | MED confidence**  
Bitcoin rebounded to $74,535 (up 5.34% in 24h), liquidating $400M-$500M in shorts and re-establishing above $70,000 after consolidation.[1]  
Polymarket shows 92% odds for $75,000 by April 30, signaling strong prediction market alignment.[1]
